locations.name: 安哥拉
locations.summary: 安哥拉共和國（葡萄牙語：República de Angola），通稱安哥拉（葡萄牙語：Angola），是位于非洲西南部的國家，西濱大西洋，北及東北鄰剛果民主共和國，南鄰納米比亞，東南鄰尚比亞，另有一塊外飛地卡賓達省，位於剛果共和國和剛果…

locations.name: 尼卡高原
locations.summary: 尼卡高原（英语：Nyika Plateau）是马拉维北部的一个高原，小部分位于赞比亚东部，高原平均海拔高度约为2100至2200米，最高处为海拔2605米的恩甘达山。高原呈钻石形，南北轴和东西轴分别长约90和50千米。高原之下有马拉维湖（…

relations.subject: Ludwig's double-collared sunbird
relations.evidence: thumb|Ludwig's Double-collared Sunbird Ludwig's double-collared sunbird (Cinnyris ludovicensis) or the montane double-collared sunbird, is a small passerine bird which breeds in forested mountains above in western Angola as well as the Nyika Plateau of northern Malawi and northeastern Zambia. This bird is sometimes considered to be con-specific with the greater double-collared sunbird (Cinnyris afer). It is sometimes placed in the genus Nectarinia
